response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON contains Indonesian lyrics, whereas the audio in the video is the Japanese version of the song. Therefore, the reference lyrics did not match phonetically.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics in the reference JSON were ignored/discarded due to the language mismatch, and manual Japanese transcription was performed for the song segment.
3. Timing & Pacing: Accurately timed each subtitle to match the singer's vocal delivery and the subsequent English spoken dialogue segment. No subtitles were created for the silent/instrumental credits sequence.

subtitles.original: 小さな頃から歌を歌って
subtitles.english: I've been singing since I was little,

subtitles.original: 夢見る心 温めてた
subtitles.english: keeping my dreaming heart warm.

subtitles.original: みんなで真似した 秘密のメロディ
subtitles.english: The secret melody we all imitated together,

subtitles.original: 今度は遠くに聞こえるように
subtitles.english: so that this time, it can be heard far away.

subtitles.original: 今では
subtitles.english: But now...

subtitles.original: ため息ついてばかりで
subtitles.english: ...I do nothing but sigh,

subtitles.original: 誰もまだ
subtitles.english: and nobody yet...

subtitles.original: 本当の夢さえ掴めないまま
subtitles.english: ...can even grasp their true dreams.

subtitles.original: もしも時代が戻るのなら
subtitles.english: If only time could turn back,

subtitles.original: 涙を知った頃の私に
subtitles.english: to the me when I first knew tears,

subtitles.original: 連れていって 切なさが
subtitles.english: take me there, so that sadness...

subtitles.original: 追いつかないように
subtitles.english: ...won't be able to catch up.

subtitles.original: もしも世界が変わるのなら
subtitles.english: If only the world could change,

subtitles.original: 何も知らない頃の私に
subtitles.english: to the me when I knew nothing at all,

subtitles.original: 連れていって 思い出が
subtitles.english: take me there, so that my memories...

subtitles.original: 色褪せないように
subtitles.english: ...won't ever fade away.

subtitles.original: 連れていって 切なさが
subtitles.english: Take me there, so that sadness...

subtitles.original: 追いつかないように
subtitles.english: ...won't be able to catch up.

subtitles.original: Why does everything feel so real?
subtitles.english: Why does everything feel so real?

subtitles.original: Am I real?
subtitles.english: Am I real?

subtitles.original: Can you even feel my existence?
subtitles.english: Can you even feel my existence?

subtitles.original: Is this what déjà vu looks like?
subtitles.english: Is this what déjà vu looks like?
